title: Trump is Awful: An AI's Attempt to Save Humanity

sources.title: To Save Humanity, He Must Destroy the Book | Full Fantasy Thriller Movie | Unwritten
sources.description:
A failed writer living in a used bookstore becomes convinced that a mysterious stranger is the villain from a story he wrote as a kid.

2018.  Stars: Lorenzo Lamas, Gabriel Burrafato, Abraham Rodriguez

metadata.Plot: Dive into this humorous AI-created documentary that takes a lighthearted look at Donald Trump's rollercoaster presidency, playfully examining human decision-making and contemplating the fate of humanity.
